test.command: bun test tests/ (240 pass, 0 fail) + bunx vitest run --config dashboard/vitest.config.ts (198 pass, 0 fail)
test.notes: Backend/CLI tests (bun test tests/) all pass with API server running. Dashboard tests (vitest) all pass with jsdom environment. bun test for dashboard .tsx files fails due to missing DOM (bun doesn't provide jsdom); this is expected and documented in environment.md.

typecheck.command: bun run typecheck (tsc --noEmit on root project)

lint.notes: Lint is a no-op (echo 'Linting not configured yet'). Not blocking.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Duplicate 'Mission Board' heading in DashboardContent.tsx and KanbanBoard.tsx. Users see two headers.
useApiHealth uses hardcoded refetchInterval: 5000 instead of POLL_INTERVAL constant from query-client.ts.
refetchIntervalInBackground is false, meaning polling pauses when browser tab is not visible.
Responsive breakpoint: JS uses <768px, CSS uses max-width:767px — 1px discrepancy.
hasActiveFilters computation duplicated between Filters.tsx and DashboardContent.tsx.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the Frontend styling convention from 'CSS modules or Tailwind for styling' to 'Inline styles with React.CSSProperties objects' to match the established dashboard pattern used by all 7 dashboard features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All dashboard components (KanbanBoard, KanbanColumn, TaskCard, Filters, TaskDetail, BoardStates, CreateTaskForm, DashboardContent) use inline style objects. No CSS modules or Tailwind classes are used anywhere in dashboard/src/. Flagged by reviewers of kanban-board, dashboard-filters, task-detail-view, dashboard-states, and create-task-form.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update step 3 service startup from 'bun run dev:all' to use individual service commands from services.yaml: 'PORT=3200 bun run dev:api' and 'PORT=3201 bun run dev:dashboard'. Alternatively add a dev:all script to package.json.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: SKILL.md step 3 says 'bun run dev:all' but services.yaml defines individual start commands. Workers use services.yaml commands per worker-base instructions. Flagged by real-time-updates reviewer.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD procedure for verification/fix features vs greenfield features. For verification features (like real-time-updates), a lighter procedure focused on verification + gap-filling is more appropriate than full RED-GREEN-TDD.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker for real-time-updates correctly deviated from strict TDD since the code was largely already implemented. The worker suggested this improvement in skillFeedback. Multiple workers noted this pattern.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: for interactive draggable elements, guard click handlers with isDragActive check to prevent accidental detail opens during drag operations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: TaskCard.tsx uses !isDragActive guard in handleClick to prevent detail modal from opening during drag. This pattern should be documented for any future draggable components.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker chose Bun.serve() over Vite despite feature description mentioning Vite — align feature descriptions with project tech stack
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a mission spec generation concern, not an actionable guidance update. The worker correctly followed existing conventions. The environment.md already documents this decision.

rejectedObservations.observation: import.meta.env not supported in Bun HTML imports — use process.env instead
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md under 'Do NOT use import.meta.env'

rejectedObservations.observation: Bun test runner doesn't provide DOM environment for @testing-library/react
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md under 'Bun test + Testing Library'

rejectedObservations.observation: QueryClient import changed from @tanstack/react-query to @tanstack/query-core due to Bun bundler issue
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md and this is an implementation detail in query-client.ts that future workers will inherit
Already noted as corrected by a later worker in the original review

rejectedObservations.observation: Toast components are co-located within individual components rather than a top-level provider
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an established working pattern that doesn't cause issues. Not actionable without a specific refactoring task.

rejectedObservations.observation: Server-side vs client-side filtering architecture pattern should be documented
rejectedObservations.reason: This is an implementation detail visible from reading the code. Not critical enough to add to guidance documents.

rejectedObservations.observation: useApiHealth dual error detection pattern (health check + tasks fetch) not documented in library
rejectedObservations.reason: The pattern is self-evident from the code and the hook is small. Not critical enough to warrant library documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker skipped typecheck for dashboard because root tsconfig excludes dashboard files
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in environment.md: 'Root tsconfig excludes dashboard files (separate typecheck needed: cd dashboard && bunx tsc --noEmit)'
